results.title: The AI classroom divide
results.description: How nations are taking different tech approaches to build a future-ready generation

results.title: Samsung Begins One UI 9 Testing Based on Android 17; Check List of Devices
results.description: Samsung is aggressively testing its Android 17-based One UI 9 across a wide array of Galaxy devices, including the popular Galaxy A26 and upcoming foldables, with an official debut rumored for July 22, 2026. This extensive internal testing indicates a rapid rollout of the next-gen UI, bringing new features like advanced AI integration and UI enhancements.
